name: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Melt the butter and chocolate together in a large saucepan over very low heat. Stir occasionally until the mixture is smooth and has no lumps.
3. Let the melted butter and chocolate cool slightly, then beat the eggs.
4. Add the beaten eggs to the cooled chocolate mixture and stir well.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sugar, baking powder, flour, and chopped nuts.
6. Pour the dry ingredients into the chocolate-butter mixture and stir until just combined.
7. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan with butter or cooking spray.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into squares. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar if desired.
Note: Serve in moderation.
